title: Review feedback
description: JSON exported by the interactive review HTML (geo-review-html skill) when a client/expert fills a brief or reviews a draft. Ingested by 04-content-brief Step 9. answers carry the human's real input and are NEVER AI-generated.

brief_id.description: Matches the priority_id / brief id this feedback belongs to.

filled_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp set by the browser at export.

filled_by.description: Reviewer's name as entered in the HTML (may be empty).

answers.description: slot_id -> expert-supplied content. Keys match REQUIRED-FILL slot ids.

comments.description: comment-target-id -> comment text. 'overall' is the whole-piece comment; other keys are section ids.

status.description: reviewed-with-comments: all slots filled and/or comments left; approved-as-is: draft accepted unchanged; partial-fill: brief returned with some slots still empty.
